description: Web PWA that listens to audio, detects time signature via BeatNet backend, shows metronome with 3 visuals, and plays real-sample drum patterns

stories.title: Monorepo Scaffold
stories.description: Initialize monorepo with Vite+React+TS frontend and FastAPI backend skeleton
acceptance_criteria: docker compose up starts both services

stories.title: Backend BeatNet Detection API
stories.description: POST /analyze accepts audio file, returns {bpm, numerator, denominator, confidence} using BeatNet

stories.title: Backend WebSocket Stream
stories.description: WebSocket /stream accepts chunked PCM audio, emits beat events in real time
acceptance_criteria: pytest test_stream: mock client receives beat events

stories.title: Zustand Store + API Client
stories.description: Define app state schema and typed fetch/WebSocket API clients

stories.title: Audio Input Components
stories.description: Mic input via getUserMedia WebSocket stream + file upload drag-and-drop, both wired to backend
acceptance_criteria: FileUpload triggers API and updates store
Verify in browser: upload WAV, see result

stories.title: Time Signature Display + BPM Controls
stories.description: Large musical notation display, manual override dropdown, BPM ±buttons, tap tempo, confidence badge

stories.title: Metronome Engine
stories.description: AudioContext look-ahead scheduler with dong (220Hz) on beat 1 and tick (880Hz) on other beats

stories.title: Beat Visual Indicators
stories.description: Pendulum (SVG), sweep bar (CSS scaleX), and large beat number — all three synchronized to metronome
acceptance_criteria: BeatNumber renders correct number from store
Verify in browser: all 3 sync at 120 BPM

stories.title: Drum Sample Loader
stories.description: Fetch and decode 6 real WAV drum samples into AudioBuffers on app init

stories.title: Drum Sequencer + Pattern Data
stories.description: Step sequencer engine locked to metronome clock, with pattern definitions for 4/4, 3/4, 6/8, 5/4, 7/8
acceptance_criteria: 4/4 Basic Rock fires kick on steps 0,8
Pattern switch applies on next bar

stories.title: Drum UI + Song Audio Toggle
stories.description: DrumPatternGrid, pattern tabs, drum mute, song audio GainNode toggle
acceptance_criteria: Grid renders correct steps for 4/4 Basic Rock
Pattern tab click updates store and grid

stories.title: PWA Configuration
stories.description: vite-plugin-pwa + Workbox: manifest, service worker, offline caching of all assets and drum samples
acceptance_criteria: Assets load offline after first visit

stories.title: UI Polish + Responsive Layout
stories.description: Full color palette, responsive CSS Grid layout, loading skeletons, error boundary, WCAG AA, keyboard nav
acceptance_criteria: Desktop + tablet layouts verified in browser

stories.title: Production Deployment
stories.description: Frontend to Vercel, backend Docker to Railway, VITE_API_URL configured
acceptance_criteria: Production URL: upload WAV → detection result
